empty_metrics_reason: Insights API returns empty arrays — likely quota limit or location verification issue

fallback_options.description: CEO manually captures GBP Insights screenshots from Google Business Profile dashboard
Use GA4 website traffic data as proxy for GBP website clicks
Use GSC data as proxy for local search impressions

ceo_action_required: Investigate Google Cloud Console for quota usage on the Business Profile API project. Check if locations are fully verified in Google Business Profile.
note: GBP connector is LIVE — it authenticates and reaches the API. The metrics arrays are empty due to an API-level issue. This is documented as PARTIAL, not BLOCKED. The fallback options provide operational continuity.
